task_focus: QA collaboration-bus review-only: runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs, event_schema_compliance, consensus_linkage, broadcasts_adoption, recovery_behavior

runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.collab_workflow_absent_from_agent_doc: stampede-commander.agent.md has zero mentions of collaboration-bus, propose->peer_review->improve->consensus->broadcast->adopt, ledger paths, required_fields, or atomic_append_guidance. Entire bus workflow conveyed via runtime prompt injection only.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.STAMPEDE_COLLAB_vars_undocumented: 7 STAMPEDE_COLLAB_* env vars exported by launcher (bin/stampede.sh:930-936) absent from agent doc's Required Workflow step 1 env discovery list.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.STAMPEDE_METASWARM_NO_GATES_contradictio: STAMPEDE_METASWARM_NO_GATES=1 override (bin/stampede.sh:912-914) instructs disable of circuit-breaker/timeout/cost ceiling; agent doc Launch-Proof lines 142-146 still mandates 'partial' status — direct contradiction.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.bundle_shape_missing_adopted_consensus_a: Runtime prompt requires adopted_consensus_item_ids/source_refs in bundle (bin/stampede.sh:910); agent doc Bundle Shape (lines 240-267) omits both fields entirely.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.model_rotation_requirement_absent_from_d: Runtime mandates model rotation across workers; agent doc only says 'explicit model override' required — no rotation requirement.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.task_id_example_drift: Agent doc Bundle Shape example uses task_id='contestant-001' (Havoc-style); live run uses 'commander-002'.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.sub_agent_vs_child_agent_terminology: Runtime prompt uses 'sub-agent' 3x; canonical filename is child-agents.jsonl and agent doc uses 'child-agent' exclusively.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.worker_depth_lock_doc_only: LEAF NODE block exists in agent doc (lines 230-236) but not echoed in runtime prompt — depth-bypass risk if commander derives worker prompt from runtime alone.
runtime_prompt_vs_agent_docs.stampede_agent_compliance: stampede-agent.agent.md confirmed compliant: no task/ask_user/read_agent/list_agents; explicit LEAF NODE rule present.

missing_evidence_field.detail: 11/11 review events missing 'evidence' field (required by protocol.json). reviews.jsonl also has 'target_commander' and 'target_item_id' fields not in protocol schema.

missing_source_refs.detail: 2 events missing source_refs (improvements.jsonl entries by commander-003/005)

event_schema_compliance.ts_format_inconsistency: Mixed formats: some use 'Z' suffix, some use '+00:00' offset, some omit microseconds — all parse as valid ISO 8601 but inconsistent.
event_schema_compliance.item_id_cross_reference_consistency: item_id values are stable within ledgers; based_on arrays and consensus_item_id references link correctly where used, but some improvements use source_item_id vs based_on inconsistently.

consensus_linkage.detail_orphaned_improvements: imp-003-terminology not referenced in any consensus based_on array

workflow_completeness.detail: commander-002 stalled at propose-only; commander-004 stalled at propose-only. 3/5 commanders completed full workflow.

consensus_linkage.adoption_linkage: No standard adopted_consensus_item_ids field enforced across commanders; commander-001 broadcast uses ADOPT prefix in summary; commander-003 uses adopted_items non-standard field.

broadcasts_adoption.schema_inconsistency: commander-003 broadcast uses adopted_items[] non-standard field; commander-001 uses consensus_item_id; no unified adoption field schema.
broadcasts_adoption.summary: Adoption is protocol-defined and launcher-instructed but never enforced by any component (commander agent, launcher validation, merger, SKILL.md, monitor).

recovery_behavior.stuck_detection: Monitor detects claimed task age > 120s (stampede-monitor.sh:201-216); orphan recovery at 180s (line 25, 237-278).
recovery_behavior.teardown_status_drift: --teardown sets phase=torn_down (swarm-state.json) but status field not set to 'stopped'; bundle writers may still be active.
recovery_behavior.duplicate_run_id: Silently tears down existing tmux session and overwrites .stampede/{run_id} data — no warning/refuse.
recovery_behavior.pid_capture_race: PID captured after fixed sleep 5 (bin/stampede.sh:293); not refreshed on pane restart; race with process startup.
recovery_behavior.retry_budget_unused: retry_budget=1 defined in context capsule constraints but no component (launcher, monitor) consumes or enforces it.
recovery_behavior.failed_commander_no_relaunch: On commander failure, launcher logs failed status but does not retry or relaunch.

gaps: stampede-commander.agent.md has zero coverage of collaboration-bus — entire workflow is runtime-prompt-only with no doc fallback.
reviews.jsonl: all 11 events missing required 'evidence' field (protocol violation).
Bundle Shape missing adopted_consensus_item_ids and source_refs despite runtime requirement.
STAMPEDE_METASWARM_NO_GATES=1 override contradicts agent doc partial-status circuit-breaker rule.
cons-c001-pre-build-minors never broadcast; imp-003-terminology never referenced in consensus.
commander-002 and commander-004 stalled at propose-only — no peer_review/improve/consensus/broadcast.
Adoption enforcement: zero components (agent, launcher, merger, SKILL.md, monitor) validate broadcast-before-complete or adopted_consensus presence.
Teardown does not drain in-flight bundle writers; duplicate run_id silently overwrites data.
No commander-specific stuck/blocked banner in monitor.
retry_budget field defined but unused; failed commanders not retried.
ts format inconsistency across ledgers (Z vs +00:00 vs microseconds).
item_id cross-ledger referencing inconsistent (adopted_items vs consensus_item_id vs based_on).
STAMPEDE_COLLAB_* env vars absent from agent doc env discovery list.
evidence: bin/stampede.sh:907-936 — STAMPEDE_COLLAB_* env vars + runtime collab prompt
bin/stampede.sh:293 — PID capture after fixed sleep 5
bin/stampede.sh teardown — sets phase=torn_down not status=stopped; no drain
